name: Impossible Cheeseburger Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cheddar or American cheese; shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Optionally, top with crisply cooked bacon.
2. Grease a pie plate (10-inch), square baking dish (8x8), or 6 custard cups (10 oz) with butter.
3. Cook and stir ground beef and onions in a skillet over medium heat until the beef is browned; drain excess fat.
4. Stir in salt and pepper, then spread the mixture into the prepared pie plate.
5. In a blender, beat milk, eggs, and 2/3 cup Bisquick for 10 seconds.
6. Beat remaining ingredients with a wire whisk or hand beater until smooth.
7. Pour the batter over the beef mixture in the pie plate.
8. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
9. Top with tomato slices and sprinkle cheese evenly.
10. Bake an additional 5-8 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Half Recipe Notes:
Use a larger casserole dish (1 quart square or round). Reduce eggs to 2 and Bisquick to 1/2 cup. Divide remaining ingredient amounts in half accordingly.
If baking at high altitude, increase the first bake time to 30 minutes.
